_doc: Anchor #5: Rook with a non-bucketed mood (weary) and empty memories. Probes how the LLM handles a mood label that has no canned-pool bucket — the LLM should still produce a drift narrate that reflects the mood verbally even though the canned-fallback path would land in `default`. Captures the LLM's freedom to interpret arbitrary mood strings.
name: rook_weary_empty
npc_seed: the forge-keeper; slow-moving and quiet; hums old songs while working the bellows, sleeves always a little sooty
